package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for gin_handler_starts_transaction_inline: Handlers that create or own transactions instead of delegating transactional work to services or unit-of-work helpers.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule050NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule050NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule050NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario050Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule050NegativeService, input Rule050NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
